title: VanillaZY紫衣的香草拓展
description: 大量拓展视觉效果与游戏体验，为原版服务器与插件服务器设计 A lot of visual effects and game experience are expanded, designed for vanilla servers and plugin servers
body:
**While the pack fully supports English, it is primarily designed for Chinese users.**

这是我的个人整合包，主要对客户端进行了大量修改。内容基本是模组整合与少量本地化，并加入了一些个性化内容。搭配 [方纹淡彩](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xekrsquarepattern) 资源包使用。

This is my personal modpack, featuring extensive client-side modifications. It primarily consists of mod integration with some localization and personalized additions. I personally use it with the [XeKr Square Pattern](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xekrsquarepattern) resource pack.

This pack utilizes a vast number of mods to enhance visuals and gameplay experience. Current mod count: 298.
> *   **Performance Note:** Ensure you allocate at least 20GB (or more) for a smooth experience.

此整合包使用大量模组来扩展视觉效果与游戏体验。当前模组数量：298。
> *   **性能提示：** 分配充足的内存至关重要。为确保流畅运行，请至少分配 20GB（起码我是这么分的）内存。

Recommended for single-player or vanilla/plugin-based server gameplay. However, **you must disable any server-disallowed mods** before joining a server!
> *   **Feedback:** *[Here](https://github.com/WisteriaZy/vanillazy/issues)*

推荐用于单人游戏或原版/插件服务器的游玩。但在加入服务器前，**请务必禁用服务器不允许的模组**！
> *   **问题反馈：** *[这里](https://github.com/WisteriaZy/vanillazy/issues)*

As a first-time modpack creator, I acknowledge the pack may have issues. It was primarily made for personal use, so I likely **cannot provide extensive support** for encountered problems (;_;).
> *   **Disclaimer:** This remains a personal-use focused pack. Use at your own discretion.

本人初次制作整合包，深知其中可能存在各种问题。此包主要为个人自用而制作，因此遇到问题时，我**大概无法提供充分的支持** (;_;)。
> *   **免责声明：** 这仍然是一个侧重于个人使用的整合包。请自行斟酌使用。

Built-in ComplementaryReimagined, from [here](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined/version/r5.5.1)
